topStories.description: Steve Hilton’s career spans British politics, Silicon Valley innovation, and American media. With a blend of policy experience, media visibility, and now a high-profile endorsement from Donald Trump, he has emerged as a key Republican figure in California’s 2026 gubernatorial race.

dailyNews.title: US Marshals Service granted exceptions for Musk’s DOGE security, waived training rules: Report
dailyNews.description: Recently disclosed government emails have now revealed that the US Marshals Service waived off requirements for Billionaire Elon Musk's security detail during his time at the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE)

dailyNews.title: Where are Iran’s power plants that Trump has threatened to destroy?
dailyNews.description: US President Trump threatens to destroy power plants, bridges by 8pm Tuesday if Iran doesn't open the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: 'Worst Is Yet To Come': Jeff Currie Warns Of Oil Catastrophe Amid US-Iran War
dailyNews.description: Currie's warning comes as oil prices have surged amid escalating tensions between the United States and Iran, raising fears of a prolonged supply disruption.

dailyNews.title: White House Easter Egg Roll: How To Watch As Trump, First Lady Melania To Participate
dailyNews.description: This year's Easter Egg celebration also carries a special patriotic spirit, as America marks its 250th birthday.

dailyNews.title: Himanta Sarma Says Congress Used Pak-Linked Fake Documents To Target Wife
dailyNews.description: Himanta Biswa Sarma said that during internal research, his team found links between the materials presented in the press conference and a Pakistani social media group.

dailyNews.title: Gold Edges Higher On Iran Diplomacy Push: Will Yellow Metal Rise To Rs 1.6 Lakh?
dailyNews.description: In case of a truce between the US and Iran, precious metals including gold and silver are expected to become dearer.

dailyNews.title: In maps and photos: Five Iranian civilian bridges at risk of US strikes
dailyNews.description: A look at the multimillion-dollar mega structures that could be threatened by Trump's 'Bridge Day' ultimatum.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the day: Michael Korda's take on discipline and goals – ‘One way to keep momentum going is to have…’
dailyNews.description: Michael Korda reminds us that momentum is fragile and must be sustained through ever-evolving goals. Achievement isn’t the end but a stepping stone; without new challenges, motivation fades. Continuous ambition keeps progress alive and prevents stagnation.

dailyNews.title: Steve Bannon case: Supreme Court clears legal path for dismissal of charges linked to Capitol riot investigation
dailyNews.description: Both federal prosecutors and Bannon requested that the Supreme Court vacate a lower appeals court ruling that had upheld his conviction. They also asked that the case be sent back to a trial court with instructions to dismiss the original charges.

dailyNews.title: ‘Not getting answers’: SC on ‘unreliable’ forensic report in Biren Singh row
dailyNews.description: “As per this report, even the Doordarshan recording is tampered with. Should we then ask him to come and record his voice?” the Supreme Court asked

dailyNews.title: Assembly elections LIVE: Congress keeps singing to Pakistan's tunes, compromising nation’s security, says PM Modi
dailyNews.description: On the development front, Prime Minister Narendra Modi alleged that the Congress had always taken a myopic view on the matter, while the BJP works towards ensuring long-term development of the nation

dailyNews.title: Ahead of Donald Trump’s Iran war briefing, Tehran rejects US 15-point plan as ‘illogical,’ hardens stance
dailyNews.description: While delivering Iranian stance on the 15-point plan, Iran foreign ministry spokesperson Esmail Baghaei also said that any negotiations cannot take place under threats.

dailyNews.title: Convicted spyware maker Bryan Fleming avoids jail at sentencing
dailyNews.description: The pcTattletale founder escapes a custodial sentence following the first successful prosecution of a spyware maker in the U.S. for over a decade.

dailyNews.title: The US could still try to play the ethnic card in Iran
dailyNews.description: But past experience and current geopolitical realities show such a strategy is doomed to failure.

dailyNews.title: Saudi Arabia hikes Arab Light crude to record premium for Asian refiners as US-Iran war continues
dailyNews.description: Saudi Arabia has raised the price of its Arab Light crude for Asian buyers to a record premium of $19.50, amid heightened tensions in the Middle East. This increase, though significant, was reportedly lower than analysts anticipated due to volatility in oil benchmarks.

dailyNews.title: How US operation to rescue air officer from Iran unfolded
dailyNews.description: President Trump says US service member whose fighter jet was shot down over Iran is rescued during two raids.

dailyNews.title: Iran claims US airman rescue may have been cover to ‘steal enriched uranium’
dailyNews.description: Amid the ongoing Middle East conflict, Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baqaei alleged that the US's plan to rescue its downed airman could have been a cover to steal the country's enriched uranium.

dailyNews.title: US Stock Market Today | Dow Jones | Nasdaq Live: S&P 500, Nasdaq futures edge up as investors weigh Iran war developments
dailyNews.description: Dow Jones Today | Nasdaq | S&P 500 | US Stock Market Live Updates: At 7:13 a.m. ET, Dow E-minis were down 62 points, or 0.13%, S&P 500 E-minis were up 4.5 points, or 0.07%, and Nasdaq 100 E-minis were up 75 points, or 0.31%. Prolonged closure of the Strait of ‌Hormuz, an essential chokepoint in global oil trade, has weighed on energy prices and has reinforced inflation fears.

dailyNews.title: How rescue of US airman in remote part of Iran unfolded
dailyNews.description: The operation to extract him from the ground in hostile territory was hugely complex and involved multiple US government agencies.

dailyNews.title: Has Trump confirmed Iran’s claim that protesters were US-armed?
dailyNews.description: US president says Washington armed Kurdish Iranian opposition groups during the January demonstrations.

dailyNews.title: White House declares ‘press lid’ sparking speculation over Trump's health; here is what we know
dailyNews.description: Trump's health issues include high cholesterol and Chronic Venous Insufficiency, confirmed by his physician. The White House has denied rumours of a medical emergency, stating he is fit for duty.

dailyNews.title: DR Congo agrees to take deportees from the US
dailyNews.description: The country will start receiving deportees from this month but has not said how many they will accept.

dailyNews.title: Young gray whale dies after swimming up river in Washington state
dailyNews.description: Hunger is a likely reason the whale, dubbed Willapa Willy, travelled inland, experts say.

topStories.title: WNBA champ Natasha Cloud takes issue with Trump's Iran message on Easter
topStories.description: New York Liberty guard Natasha Cloud slammed President Donald Trump for his Easter Sunday warning to Iran, saying a president threatening to bomb "is not a man of Christ."

topStories.title: Harvard alum praises Trump admin targeting university admissions policies, handling of antisemitism
topStories.description: Harvard graduate praises the Trump admin for launching new federal probes alleging antisemitism failures and illegal race-based admissions preferences.

topStories.description: Global leaders are struggling in their efforts to find a way to end the American-Israeli war on Iran, and they are spooked about what President Trump might do next.

dailyNews.description: Global leaders are struggling in their efforts to find a way to end the American-Israeli war on Iran, and they are spooked about what President Trump might do next.

dailyNews.title: Plunging International Student Enrollment Under Trump Squeezes Colleges
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration’s campaign to curtail international students is not just hitting the elite schools targeted by the government.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Foreign Aid Overhaul Sent Millions More Dollars to Big U.S.-Based Contractors
dailyNews.description: While organizations in the developing world were nearly shut out, the big aid agencies DOGE had called wasteful received huge infusions of cash, a new analysis found.

dailyNews.title: Forget the A.I. Apocalypse. Memes Have Already Nuked Our Culture.
dailyNews.description: From our jokes and slang to the White House’s policy messaging, internet “brain rot” has escaped our phones to take over … well, everything.

dailyNews.title: Iran and US Receive Proposal for 45-Day Ceasefire: Report
dailyNews.description: Iran and the United States have reportedly received a proposal calling for a 45-day ceasefire and the reopening of the crucial Strait of Hormuz. The proposal was sent by mediators from Egypt, Pakistan and Turkey, according to the Associated Press. Over the weekend, President Donald Trump imposed a new Tuesday deadline to reopen the Strait of Hormuz in a profane-filled that threatened to destroy Iran's civilian infrastructure. NBC’s Gabe Gutierrez reports for TODAY.

dailyNews.title: Sen. Kaine skeptical Congress will pass $1.5T military budget
dailyNews.description: Sen. Tim Kaine, D-Va., expressed skepticism on “Meet the Press” Sunday about the Trump administration’s 2027 budget plan, which includes a request of $1.5 trillion from Congress to fund the Defense Department.

dailyNews.title: Trump calls rescue of F-15E airman an ‘Easter Miracle’
dailyNews.description: In a text message to “Meet the Press” moderator Kristen Welker, President Trump reacted to U.S. forces safely rescuing the second F-15E crew member of a two-seat fighter jet that went down over Iran on Friday.

dailyNews.title: Trump's profanity-laced ultimatum to Iran looms over new bid for truce
dailyNews.description: Trump's threat to destroy Iran's power plants and bridges if it doesn't make a deal to end the war by Tuesday is looming over a Pakistani ceasefire push.

dailyNews.title: Trump to hold news conference on Iran after U.S. airman's rescue
dailyNews.description: President Trump is scheduled to hold a news conference Monday afternoon following the successful rescue of a U.S. airman from inside Iran.

dailyNews.title: Former CIA official on Trump's threats to Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump's latest comments on Iran are raising questions about the course of the war. CBS News contributor Joseph Zacks, a former deputy assistant director for counterterrorism for the CIA, joins with more insight.

dailyNews.title: Key details on Iran war after Trump posts profanity-laced threats
dailyNews.description: President Trump posted an ultimatum on social media laced with profanity on Iran and the Strait of Hormuz. CBS News' Aaron Navarro and Charlie D'Agata report, and contributor Joseph Zacks has more insight.

dailyNews.title: U.S. and Iran haven't backed ceasefire idea as Trump's Hormuz Strait deadline nears
dailyNews.description: The 45-day ceasefire proposal, which could lead to an end to the war, is reportedly being discussed by the U.S., Iran and a group of regional mediators.

dailyNews.title: Robinhood, BNY to build Trump Accounts app
dailyNews.description: The Treasury Department designated BNY as the financial agent to manage Trump accounts. BNY will also partner with Robinhood on a Trump accounts app.
